Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly supports innovation (Target 9.5) by teaching system analysis and using 'computer systems' as the main example, which are core modern infrastructure (Target 9.1).
evidence: 以電腦系統為主要例子

evidence: 能將數學的應用融入日常生活當中

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Analyzing system performance and delays, particularly in computer systems, can lead to optimized resource use and reduced waste in computational processes (Target 12.2).
